meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Fixing Slow Development with AI Workflows
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Learn a high-speed client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship SaaS apps faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous CLI-based file manipulation. By standardizing your project initialization and automating repetitive coding tasks, you reduce manual overhead, ensure professional-grade output, and cut your time-to-market for client deliverables by over 60%.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you are trapped in a loop of boilerplate code and configuration hell. Every minute spent setting up folder structures or debugging trivial syntax errors is a minute stolen from your profit margin. In the freelance arena, speed is not just a metric; it is your primary competitive advantage.

But what if you could compress weeks of manual labor into hours of intelligent automation? By leveraging the synergy between Antigravity and Claude Code, you can transcend the limitations of manual coding. This is the blueprint for building high-quality SaaS applications at scale, designed specifically for the modern AI-augmented developer.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop starting from scratch. Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready repository structure that includes authentication, database schema, and API routes instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack SaaS boilerplate with Next.js 14, Supabase auth, and Tailwind CSS. Include a folder structure optimized for feature-based development.

steps.title: Automated Context Injection
steps.description: Feed your project requirements into the codebase to ensure Claude Code understands your specific business logic and design system immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and create a comprehensive technical specification file in the root directory named 'SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md'.

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Implementation
steps.description: Instead of writing components line-by-line, task the agent with building out specific UI modules based on your Antigravity-generated architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable dashboard component that fetches data from the Supabase API and renders an interactive chart using Recharts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the dashboard component following the patterns in SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md'

steps.title: Rapid Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Automate the feedback loop by having Claude Code write and run unit tests for every new feature you push to the repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for all new components in the src/components folder, ensuring 90% coverage for edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Write tests for the new dashboard feature and run them to confirm stability'

steps.title: Deployment-Ready Cleanup
steps.description: Ensure the codebase is production-ready by automating linting, dependency pruning, and documentation generation before the client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final audit of the codebase, remove unused dependencies, and generate a README.md file explaining how to deploy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Clean up the repo and generate a deployment guide'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Design System' in a single JSON file; Claude Code can reference this to maintain visual consistency across all pages.
Use Antigravity to create 'feature templates' for repeating client requests, like Stripe billing integrations or user profile management.
Never commit code generated by AI without a quick manual review; treat Claude Code as a junior developer who needs a senior's oversight.
Chain your prompts: ask the agent to explain its plan before executing, allowing you to catch architectural flaws early.
Leverage the .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from processing massive node_modules or build directories, drastically increasing speed.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, focus on building a personal library of Antigravity templates to make your next client project even faster.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start mastering your workflow. By implementing these strategies, you are not just coding faster—you are building a sustainable, high-margin freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
